## Checklist

- [ ] Branched off latest `main`
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] No secrets in the diff (`.env`, API keys, credentials)
- [ ] Docs / README updated if behavior changed
- [ ] DB migration added if schema changed (and `supabase/schema.sql` updated)
- [ ] RTL / Hebrew copy verified for UI changes
